description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a slim build, standing upright and facing forward. He is wearing a short-sleeved t-shirt featuring a graphic design with a central emblem and flame motifs along the lower edge. His pants are cropped, ending just above the ankles, and have a relaxed fit with a side pocket detail. He is wearing open-toed flip-flop sandals on his feet. His face is partially covered by a dark mask, and his hair is styled in a spiky, voluminous manner. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban streetwear style suitable for warm weather.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a graphic t-shirt, cropped pants, flip-flops, a face mask, and spiky hair, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, face mask, and spiky hairstyle clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cropped pants, side pocket, and profile of the face mask and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirt with flame motifs and the back of the cropped pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the relaxed fit of the pants, flip-flops, and the side profile of the face and hair.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and cropped relaxed-fit pants with a face mask
